headline: Q1 Rundown: Texas Pacific Land (NYSE:TPL) Vs Other U.S. Shale E&P Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at U.S. shale E&P stocks, starting with Texas Pacific Land (NYSE:TPL).
